## Overview

Restructure Agent is a stateless, platform-agnostic LLM-based agent that transforms vague user intent into well-structured issues (meta-prompts for downstream agents). It explores existing specs via SpecStore, identifies information gaps, and either asks clarification questions or produces structured issues.

### Core Concept

**Issues are not project management tickets — they are structured prompts for downstream agents (Architect, Coder, Reviewer).**

The agent is intentionally thin: all intelligence lives in the LLM call + system prompt. Agent code only assembles the prompt, calls the LLM with structured output, and returns the result.

### Key Properties

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Stateless | Yes — adapter passes full context each call |
| Platform-agnostic | Yes — standard I/O only, no GH/GL/Jira API calls |
| Tools | SpecStore only (read/search specs) |
| Multi-turn | Via external adapter (not internal state) |
| Output | JSON Schema-enforced discriminated union |
